hero.title: Industrial Commercial Kitchen Engineering

hero.imageAlt: Industrial commercial kitchen — Pakistan, primary project view

about.title: Thermal efficiency and spatial precision
about.lede: This project showcases a high-density industrial kitchen where thermal efficiency meets spatial precision. The layout supports high-volume food production with strict safety and workflow standards, moving from traditional setups to a data-rich, build-ready environment optimized for industrial durability.

blocks.title: Systemic convergence layout
blocks.body: The plan integrates massive walk-in cold rooms and freezer complexes. Industrial resin flooring gives a non-slip, hygienic surface for chemical cleaning and heavy trolleys. A 2190 mm grid ceiling is tuned for MEP serviceability so ventilation and wiring stay accessible without disrupting operations.

blocks.title: Electrical spine and automation
blocks.body: The electrical backbone places isolators on a 1200 mm datum for rapid access and safety. Motion-sensitive lighting reduces energy use in storage and cold zones. Grease traps and drainage pumps sit near fryers and hobs so the line stays code-compliant.

blocks.title: Hotline and hygiene
blocks.body: The hotline clusters high-output equipment next to hot-hold stations to shorten the path to the service window. Under-spine utility routing keeps the floor clear while MEP stays organized and reachable — the modular synchronicity response to cluttered lines and poor maintenance access.

blocks.title: Key line items
blocks.body: Thermal: Rational combi oven (20-1/1 GN electric). Bakery: Salva modular deck oven (electric, 2-tray). Prep: Sirman spiral dough mixers (32 L floor). Refrigeration: Foster blast chiller (BCT15-7 under-counter). Processing: Elro bratt pan (DBGN23 high-capacity).

gallery.title: Visual documentation
gallery.subtitle: Images are loaded from Vercel Blob for this prefix. Captions use each file name; add a main/main.webp (or .jpg) for the hero and card.

callout.title: Need a build-ready industrial kitchen package?
callout.body: We coordinate MEP, equipment schedules, and construction sequencing so your drawings work the first day on site.
